instructions: Zweihänder Reforged survivor sheet. Percentile (d100, roll-under) system. Enter your seven Primary Attribute percentiles and Secondary Attribute Modifiers; the sheet derives every [XB] Secondary Attribute Bonus, your Peril and Damage thresholds, Movement, Initiative, and each skill's Total Chance of Success (peril-adjusted). Click a skill's Roll button for a Custom-Roll-Parsing d100 test that reports Success / Failure / Critical (matched digits, with 01 always a Critical Success and 100 always a Critical Failure), factoring the selected Difficulty Rating and any situational modifier. This is a FILL-ONLY sheet (no guided character generation yet). Data round-trips with the canonical @gamecodex/system-zweihander-reforged model. This is an unofficial, fan-made community sheet authored by Jared Nielsen for the WOGD Zweihänder Reforged ruleset; it is not officially maintained or supported by WOGD.
